description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, shingled roof with a prominent gable and a decorative circular window on the front facade. The structure includes a tall, narrow tower with a domed cap and spire, adding a vertical accent to the design. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored masonry with regularly spaced rectangular windows, and the front entryway is accessed by a small set of steps leading to a covered porch supported by columns. A large wraparound wooden porch extends along the front and one side, providing ample outdoor space. The roof is adorned with finials and chimneys, contributing to the ornate, historic appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of Victorian-era architecture, with its asymmetrical layout, decorative trim, and complex roofline.
description: A Victorian-style house with a steep gabled roof, tower, wraparound porch, and ornate detailing in light masonry and wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gable, circular window, tower with dome, entry steps, and wraparound porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tower, gable end with circular window, and symmetrical window arrangement on the masonry wall.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the plain masonry wall, side of the gable, and the continuation of the porch.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by the large shingled roof and the full extent of the wooden porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, covered porch, columns, and decorative trim
